description: Contextless founder trial pack for validating the current local-model chat-quality surface through AnythingLLM and the workflow-router gateway.

trial_stages.description: Confirm the local model, gateway, controller, AnythingLLM, and frozen fixtures are reachable before prompt testing.

commands.failure_recovery: Run bash stop-agent-prompt-proxies.sh, confirm vLLM is live on 8000, then start again.
Restart vLLM and gateway/proxies, then verify AnythingLLM is configured to use http://127.0.0.1:8500/v1.
Open or restart the AnythingLLM Desktop app, wait for http://127.0.0.1:3001 to respond, then rerun this command.
Fix the failed_check_ids before opening AnythingLLM prompt testing.
Restart vLLM, AnythingLLM, and gateway/proxies, then rerun this readiness gate.

commands.expected_marker: PHASE195 RELEASE CANDIDATE FOUNDER TRIAL PACK PASS
commands.failure_recovery: Rebuild missing proof artifacts or fix the reported pack validation errors.

expected_markers: PHASE195 RELEASE CANDIDATE FOUNDER TRIAL PACK PASS

trial_stages.description: Run the smallest representative founder prompt set first.
expected_answer_qualities: Answer appears in chat before artifact inspection.
Workflow, selected skills, and route evidence are visible.
The response cites files, tests, commands, or decomposition evidence appropriate to the prompt.

trial_stages.description: Run the broader read-only prompt set after smoke prompts pass.
expected_answer_qualities: The selected workflow matches the cataloged prompt family.
The answer includes bounded source evidence or an honest no-evidence statement.
The response remains read-only and does not request manual skill injection.

known_limits: Advanced broad refactor orchestration is not released.
The trial validates the current local model and the two frozen Coinbase fixture roots.
FormatA and JSON are the only governed output formats.
Mutation-capable prompts are not part of the founder trial pack.
AnythingLLM must point to http://127.0.0.1:8500/v1 for natural workflow testing.

templates.template: Record feedback for run workflow-router-YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSffffffZ: confusing: <what was hard to understand>. missing: <what context was missing>. expected: <what you expected instead>.
Record feedback for run workflow-router-YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSffffffZ: missing: <expected answer detail>. confusing: <what was unclear>. expected: <specific answer marker, source ref, or command>.

Record feedback for run workflow-router-YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSffffffZ: wrong: selected the wrong workflow or skill. missing: <expected route evidence>. confusing: <what route or skill looked wrong>. expected: <documented workflow or prompt family>.

recovery: Stop prompt testing immediately if either fixture changes.
Restore the frozen fixture from its known-good source or recreate a disposable copy.

recovery.anythingllm_down: Open or restart the AnythingLLM Desktop app, wait for http://127.0.0.1:3001 to respond, then rerun curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3001 and python3 scripts/validate_post_restart_runtime_readiness.py.
recovery.stale_proxies: Run bash stop-agent-prompt-proxies.sh, confirm vLLM is live, then run bash start-agent-prompt-proxies.sh.
recovery.wrong_anythingllm_target: Set the Generic OpenAI-compatible base URL to http://127.0.0.1:8500/v1 and model to Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct.
recovery.missing_api_key: Export ANYTHINGLLM_API_KEY from the Windows user environment before API validation.
recovery.dirty_fixture: Stop testing, restore the fixture, and rerun the post-restart readiness gate.
recovery.failed_doctor: Fix the reported failed_check_ids before running founder prompts.

next_action: Run the founder trial pack, capture feedback against workflow-router run IDs, then use Phase 196 to reassess V1 readiness.
